title: 'Spontaneous remission from biopsy trauma'
body:
I was reading about lung cancer going into complete spontaneous remission after biopsy trauma, here is one recorded case:  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC4573999/  

This hasn't been well researched yet, maybe it's an idea if we did many N=1 trials, asking the oncologist to give this a try by creating one or more tiny traumas in the lungs and monitor it.  
Who knows, it might be a breakthrough...
